Shadow RCVR Trigger

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x9c
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Shadow of FCR[7:6] (RT) allowing RX FIFO trigger level change without rewriting FCR. Only present when FIFO_MODE and SHADOW are configured.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:2] reserved rw 0x0 -
[1:0] srt rw 0x0 SRT

Field Descriptions

srt - SRT

Shadow RCVR Trigger. RX FIFO trigger level for interrupt and DMA. 00=1 char, 01=FIFO 1/4 full, 10=FIFO 1/2 full, 11=FIFO 2 less than full.
